backstory.original: Jamilah is a Human Barbarian, played by actor (and part time DM) Deborah Ann Woll, and the second brand-new Force Grey character added this season. Shipwrecked as a young child, Jamilah washed up on the shores of Chult. Luckily, the people of this forbidding land took her in and raised her as one of their own. Having grown into a strong and confident young woman, she now longs to leave Chult and explore other lands, challenging anyone along her way to arm wrestling or thigh crushing contests of might.
backstory.display: 嘉米拉是个人类野蛮人，由演员（兼职 DM）Deborah Ann Woll 扮演，是灰色小队本季加入的第二个全新角色。嘉米拉在年幼时遭遇船难，被冲到了楚尔特海岸。幸运的是这片禁忌之地的人们接纳了她，将她作为亲人抚养，如今她已经成长为一个强壮而自信的姑娘。她渴望离开楚尔特，探索其他土地，向沿途遇上的任何人发起挑战，进行掰手腕或压大腿的力量对决。

description.original: Jamilah attacks the closest enemy. If more enemies are nearby, she attacks up to 2 of them and reduces her base and ultimate c/ds by 2 secs.
description.display: 嘉米拉攻击距离最近的敌人。如果附近还有更多敌人，她会攻击最多 2 名敌人，并使她的基本攻击和杀招冷却时间减少 2 秒。

description.original: Jamilah leaps quickly from enemy to enemy, swinging her greatsword.
description.display: 嘉米拉挥舞大剑，迅速从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人。

longDescription.original: Jamilah leaps quickly from enemy to enemy, swinging her greatsword through them in a feat of strength and agility. She hits 6 times in total.
longDescription.display: 嘉米拉以无比的力量和敏捷迅速从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人，并挥舞大剑进行总共 6 次攻击。

description.desc: Increase $source's health by $amount, plus $percent% of the max Health of each Tank Champion they are adjacent to
$source的生命值提升 $amount 加上与其相邻的每位坦克勇士最大生命值的 $percent%
Increase $source's damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Tank Champion she is adjacent to
每与一位坦克勇士相邻，则为$source提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Jamilah's damage is increased when she's near tanks. Put her near the front of your formation to take advantage of this.
tipText.display: 嘉米拉靠近坦克时伤害提高。将她放置在阵型前方从而利用此效果。

description.desc: Increase $source's damage by up to $amount%, based on how many temporary hit points they currently have (max value at 2x max health)
提升$source的伤害，最高可至 $amount%，提升数值基于其当前拥有的临时生命值（提升数值最多为 2 倍最大生命值）

tipText.original: Jamilah's damage is increased dramatically when she has a temporary hit point shield on her. Pair her with Champions that shield!
tipText.display: 嘉米拉获得临时的生命值护盾时，她的伤害会大幅提高。为她搭配会施放护盾的勇士！

specializationDescription.original: Jamilah increases her synergy with your front-line tanks to become an even bigger threat.
specializationDescription.display: 嘉米拉加强与前线坦克的配合，从而成为更可怕的威胁。

specializationDescription.original: Jamilah gains even more confidence when under the protection of a temporary hit point shield.
specializationDescription.display: 嘉米拉获得临时生命值护盾的时候信心猛增。

description.desc: Increase $source's damage by $amount% for each enemy attacking $source or an adjacent Champion.
每有一名敌人正在攻击$source或与其相邻的勇士，即为$source提升 $amount% 伤害

description.original: The taverns of Chult trained me for this day.
description.display: 楚尔特的酒馆训练了我，就为了这一天。

description.original: Up close and personal.
description.display: 近距离接触。

description.original: The only weapon I need is my mind. Also my sword.
description.display: 我唯一需要的武器就是我的大脑，还有我的剑。

description.original: I shall charge into battle with my sword swinging.
description.display: 我将挥舞利剑，冲锋进入战场。

description.original: It couldn't hurt to be more agile.
description.display: 更灵活点没有坏处。

description.original: Perhaps I'm a little rough around the edges.
description.display: 也许我还不够完美。

description.original: It's easy to get overwhelmed in the heat of battle.
description.display: 在激烈战斗中很容易被压制。

description.original: If I'm going to be up front, I won't fear my enemies.
description.display: 如果我要站前面，我不会害怕我的敌人。

description.original: A bangle or two from my days as a youth.
description.display: 这是我年轻时戴过的手镯。

description.original: Carved from the most wondrous trees that grow only in Chult.
description.display: 这是采用楚尔特独有的某种树木雕刻而成的。

description.original: More elegant arm wear for a more successful adventurer.
description.display: 更加高贵的首饰才能配得上更加成功的冒险者。

name.display: 珍贵的楚尔特铭刻手镯

description.original: Beautiful bangles bought from an adventurous merchant.
description.display: 从某位行商处买来的美丽手镯。

description.original: Someone hasn't been taking good care of their boots.
description.display: 靴子的主人没有好好照料它。

description.original: Uncommonly soft and comfortable, they allow me to be light on my feet.
description.display: 非一般的柔软和舒适，穿上去感觉身轻如燕。

description.original: A fine pair of boots with a padded sole.
description.display: 内含软垫的精致靴子。

description.original: They'll never hear me coming.
description.display: 敌人甚至不会察觉到我逼近。

description.original: I had a similar sword in my youth. I outgrew it quickly.
description.display: 我年轻时也拥有过类似的剑。但很快就跟不上我的水平了。

description.original: A sharp blade, but not too sharp that you'll slip up and grievously injure yourself.
description.display: 很锋利的剑刃，但不至于锐利到碰一下就会误伤自己。

description.original: A fine sword fit for a Chultan sword master.
description.display: 楚尔特剑术大师常用的一种精良巨剑。

description.original: They'll never see me coming.
description.display: 敌人至死也不知道怎么一回事。

description.original: A simple periapt that grants some small magic.
description.display: 蕴含着简单魔法的护符。

description.original: A fine trinket passed down for generations.
description.display: 世代相传的精良护身符。

description.original: A heroic amulet granted to me by a village leader after I saved some villagers.
description.display: 这个英勇护身符是被我拯救的村子的村长送给我的。

description.original: I pray that death will never find me, but if it does I'll be ready.
description.display: 祈求死亡不会找上门来，但我也做好了万一的准备。

description.original: There's not much power left in this ring.
description.display: 这戒指里没剩下多少魔力了。

description.original: Something lurks within. This ring holds a small amount of power.
description.display: 里头潜藏着某些东西。此戒指蕴含着少量的魔力。

description.original: The beauty of this ring is eclipsed only by its power.
description.display: 这枚戒指的美丽仅仅逊色于它所蕴含的魔力。

description.original: The power of this ring allows me to charge into battle carefree.
description.display: 这枚戒指的魔力能助我在战场上肆无忌惮地战斗。

description.original: Nothing's worse than a cold neck. Not even this scarf.
description.display: 冻伤脖子是很要命的。比这破围巾还要命。

description.original: A simple scarf to ward off the bitter wind.
description.display: 可以御寒的简易围巾。

description.original: A fine scarf purchased from a merchant in Port Nyanzaru.
description.display: 这条精美的项链是从南扎路港某位商人处买来的。

description.original: A masterfully crafted scarf found in the wreckage of the boat that brought me to Chult.
description.display: 就是这条在失事船只的残骸上找到的精致围巾引导我来到了楚尔特。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a NEUTRAL alignment

display.name: 演员
display.description: 也许我还不够完美。

display.description: 在激烈战斗中很容易被压制。

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: If I'm going to be up front, I won't fear my enemies.

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 如果我要站前面，我不会害怕我的敌人。

original.name: Weapon Master
original.description: The only weapon I need is my mind. Also my sword.

display.name: 武器大师
display.description: 我唯一需要的武器就是我的大脑，还有我的剑。

original.name: Primitive Bangles

display.name: 原始的手镯

original.name: Wooden Bangles
original.description: Carved from the most wondrous trees that grow only in Chult.

display.name: 木质手镯
display.description: 这是采用楚尔特独有的某种树木雕刻而成的。

original.name: Metal Bangles

display.name: 金属手镯
display.description: 更加高贵的首饰才能配得上更加成功的冒险者。

original.name: Precious Inscribed Bangles of Chult
original.description: Beautiful bangles bought from an adventurous merchant.

display.name: 珍贵的楚尔特铭刻手镯
display.description: 从某位行商处买来的美丽手镯。

original.name: Scuffed Boots
original.description: Someone hasn't been taking good care of their boots.

display.name: 磨损的靴子
display.description: 靴子的主人没有好好照料它。

original.name: Soft Boots
original.description: Uncommonly soft and comfortable, they allow me to be light on my feet.

display.name: 柔软的靴子
display.description: 非一般的柔软和舒适，穿上去感觉身轻如燕。

original.name: Stealthy Boots
original.description: A fine pair of boots with a padded sole.

display.name: 潜行靴子
display.description: 内含软垫的精致靴子。

original.name: Masterful Boots of Elvenkind
original.description: They'll never hear me coming.

display.name: 大师级精灵族靴子
display.description: 敌人甚至不会察觉到我逼近。

original.name: Trainee's Greatsword
original.description: I had a similar sword in my youth. I outgrew it quickly.

display.name: 学员的巨剑
display.description: 我年轻时也拥有过类似的剑。但很快就跟不上我的水平了。

original.name: Apprentice's Greatsword
original.description: A sharp blade, but not too sharp that you'll slip up and grievously injure yourself.

display.name: 学徒的巨剑
display.description: 很锋利的剑刃，但不至于锐利到碰一下就会误伤自己。

original.name: Master's Greatsword
original.description: A fine sword fit for a Chultan sword master.

display.name: 大师的巨剑
display.description: 楚尔特剑术大师常用的一种精良巨剑。

original.name: Deathbringer Greatsword
original.description: They'll never see me coming.

display.name: 死亡使者巨剑
display.description: 敌人至死也不知道怎么一回事。

original.name: Simple Periapt
original.description: A simple periapt that grants some small magic.

display.name: 简单的护符
display.description: 蕴含着简单魔法的护符。

original.name: Fine Periapt
original.description: A fine trinket passed down for generations.

display.name: 精致的护符
display.description: 世代相传的精良护身符。

original.name: Heroic Periapt
original.description: A heroic amulet granted to me by a village leader after I saved some villagers.

display.name: 英勇护符
display.description: 这个英勇护身符是被我拯救的村子的村长送给我的。

original.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
original.description: I pray that death will never find me, but if it does I'll be ready.

display.name: 愈合护符
display.description: 祈求死亡不会找上门来，但我也做好了万一的准备。

original.name: Cold Ring
original.description: There's not much power left in this ring.

display.name: 寒冷的戒指
display.description: 这戒指里没剩下多少魔力了。

original.name: Warm Ring
original.description: Something lurks within. This ring holds a small amount of power.

display.name: 暖和的戒指
display.description: 里头潜藏着某些东西。此戒指蕴含着少量的魔力。

original.name: Emerald Ring
original.description: The beauty of this ring is eclipsed only by its power.

display.name: 翡翠戒指
display.description: 这枚戒指的美丽仅仅逊色于它所蕴含的魔力。

original.name: Ring of Protection
original.description: The power of this ring allows me to charge into battle carefree.

display.name: 保护之戒
display.description: 这枚戒指的魔力能助我在战场上肆无忌惮地战斗。

original.name: Torn Scarf
original.description: Nothing's worse than a cold neck. Not even this scarf.

display.name: 撕裂的围巾
display.description: 冻伤脖子是很要命的。比这破围巾还要命。

original.name: Plain Scarf
original.description: A simple scarf to ward off the bitter wind.

display.name: 朴素的围巾
display.description: 可以御寒的简易围巾。

original.name: Patterned Scarf
original.description: A fine scarf purchased from a merchant in Port Nyanzaru.

display.name: 有图案的围巾
display.description: 这条精美的项链是从南扎路港某位商人处买来的。

original.name: Tasselled Scarf of the Island
original.description: A masterfully crafted scarf found in the wreckage of the boat that brought me to Chult.

display.name: 海岛流苏围巾
display.description: 就是这条在失事船只的残骸上找到的精致围巾引导我来到了楚尔特。

使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
